rationale: Fresh validator started from CodeWiki state and handoff refs. TASK-080 implementation build is commit-ready: it has task id, source planning refs, acceptance mapping, code/test evidence, checks, closure brief, commit title/body, and CodeWiki task/build/checks/validation/recover trailers. Current gateway code blocks implementation pass reports when commit-readiness fields are missing, while task-close/publication profiles still require clean immutable content proof and cannot pass with dirty working-tree digest alone.

isolation_requirement.reason: Implementation validation requires independent validator context and checked content proof.

isolation.notes: Fresh validation session used repository truth and handoff refs only; dirty digest covers 344 git status --porcelain entries before writing this report.
